_publications._publicationTitle: NF1 heterozygosity fosters de novo tumorigenesis but impairs malignant transformation.

_contextSnippet: immunohistochemistry using keratin 1 (K1, an epithelial cell marker that is lost upon cancer progression) antibodies confirmed the low expression of K1 in tumor samples
details: Successfully distinguished between benign papillomas (K1 positive) and malignant SCCs (K1 low expression) in DMBA/TPA-induced tumors
